title: Patrol Case SSE Shows Full Casework Process

criteria.description: Patrol SSE messages contain actual thinking/tool content
criteria.evidence: broadcastSDKMessages deep-parses message.message.content (nested SDK structure) instead of message.content (which returned empty)

criteria.description: Patrol uses case-step-progress event type for frontend consistency
criteria.evidence: 4 case-step-progress broadcast points in sdk-message-broadcaster.ts, replacing old case-session-thinking/tool-call events

criteria.description: Agent Monitor shows same detail for patrol cases as single-case
criteria.evidence: Full lifecycle events (started/progress/completed) emitted, same caseSessionStore path as single-case processing

criteria.description: Patrol step name preserved for message identification
criteria.evidence: step: 'patrol' passed to broadcastSDKMessages and all lifecycle events
